features: Clearasil Gentle Skin Perfecting Wash is a gentle cleanser that deep cleans pores while hydrating the skin.

Contains Aloe Vera and Cucumber Extracts and Vitamin B3 in a pH-balanced formula to be gentle on skin, helping to keep skin clear of breakouts all day, every day and leaving the skin hydrated after washing.
description: Care for your skin with a convenient pump-action Clearasil Gentle Skin Perfecting Wash, a daily cleansing wash that has been formulated to help cleanse and prevent breakouts all day, every day. Clearasil Gentle Skin Perfecting Wash is dermatologist tested and contains Aloe Vera and Cucumber Extracts and Vitamin B3 in a pH-balanced formula to give you a gentle yet effective way to care for your skin. Clearasil Gentle Gel Wash deep cleans pores without over-drying the skin, while leaving it hydrated after washing. Use every morning and evening. Simply wet face, dispense the product into your hands, massage gently onto face avoiding the eyes and rinse.
